summary: Frontend-only testing of expanded Sahib Design System Editor. All major features working: sidebar groups, logos display, component displays, alerts, email templates, shadows, motion tokens, token editing, save, export buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 sidebar groups visible (المبادئ, الهوية, المكونات, الأنماط, المنصات). Logos section shows PROTECTED banner + all brand assets (System A, System B, wordmarks). Buttons/Alerts/Email templates all render correctly. Shadows shows 3 preview cards. Motion shows 3 hover buttons. Token editing, save (تم الحفظ!), and export (CSS/JSON/MD) all working. Component badge shows on display sections.
